zh.lifeSummary: 當John Radford II於1540年出生在英國戴文其其時，他的父親John Radford I30歲，母親Margaret Raleigh33歲。他於1562年4月2日與Mary Bennett在英國英格蘭戴文德利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年在英國戴文德利享年34歲，埋葬在英國素瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Radford II于1540年出生在英国戴文其其时，他的父亲John Radford I30岁，母亲Margaret Raleigh33岁。他于1562年4月2日与Mary Bennett在英国英格兰戴文德利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1574年在英国戴文德利享年34岁，埋葬在英国素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Radford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Radford (Devon, Nottinghamshire, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Worcestershire), Raddiford (Devon), Ratford (Sussex, Wiltshire), Redford (Angus, Fife, Midlothian, Dorset, Sussex), Retford (Nottinghamshire), Rodford (Gloucestershire), or Rudford (Gloucestershire). Most of these placenames appear to derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + ford ‘ford’, though some are likely to derive from Old English hrēod ‘reed’ + ford (e.g. Rodford and Rudford (Gloucestershire)), and the Oxfordshire placename may derive from Old English rād ‘riding’ + ford, probably meaning ‘ford which can be crossed on horseback’. This English name has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 16th century.

variants.name: Redifer
meanings: Possibly English: variant of Reddiford, itself a variant of Radford .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Radford II was born in 1540, in Whitchurch, Devon, England, his father, John Radford I, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Raleigh, was 33. He married Mary Bennett on 2 April 1562, in Chudleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1574, in Chudleigh, Devon, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Radford II est né en 1540, à Whitchurch, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Radford I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Raleigh, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bennett le 2 avril 1562, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1574, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Radford II 1540 in Whitchurch, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Radford I 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Raleigh 33. Er hat am 2. April 1562 in Chudleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom Mary Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1574 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Chudleigh, Devon, England und wurde in Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Radford II è nato il nel 1540 nel Whitchurch, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Radford I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Raleigh, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bennett il 2 aprile 1562, nel Chudleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1574, nel Chudleigh, Devon, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Radford IIが1540年にイギリスデボンウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父John Radford Iは30歳，母Margaret Raleighは33歳であった。1562年4月2日にイギリスイギリスデボンチウドレイグでMary Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1574年にイギリスデボンチウドレイグで34歳で死去し，イギリススリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Radford II(이)가 1540년 영국 데폰 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Radford I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Raleigh(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1562년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 c후들리에서 Mary Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Radford II nasceu em 1540, em Whitchurch, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Radford I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Raleigh, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bennett em 2 de abril de 1562, em Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1574, em Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Radford II родился в 1540 г. в местности уичурч, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Radford I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Raleigh, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bennett 2 апреля 1562 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1574 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Radford II nació en 1540, en Whitchurch, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Radford I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Raleigh, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mary Bennett el 2 de abril de 1562, en Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1574, en Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Surrey, Inglaterra.
